executiveSummary: Chico Electric has been serving the area for decades, and like Chico Plumbing, your domain name chicoelectric.com is a perfect keyword match for local searches. That's an enormous built-in advantage that most businesses would pay thousands for. But the current website isn't leveraging it.

The site is built on WordPress with the CherryFramework theme — a framework that hasn't been updated in years. There's no meta description, no schema markup, no H1 tag, and the blog has placeholder lorem ipsum posts dating back to 2013. Those fake blog posts are actually hurting your SEO because Google sees them as thin, low-quality content.

Electrical work is a high-trust, high-intent category — homeowners need a licensed electrician they can trust. With proper technical SEO, real content, and your established reputation, Chico Electric can dominate local search results and capture more of those high-value electrical service calls.

assessment.title: Website Analysis — chicoelectric.com
points: Built on WordPress with CherryFramework theme (outdated framework).
Domain name perfectly matches local search intent ('Chico Electric').
Site appears to have been set up years ago with minimal updates.

assessment.title: Critical SEO Gaps
points: No meta description on any page.
No schema markup — no LocalBusiness, no Service, no Electrician schema.
No H1 tag on homepage — major structural SEO issue.
Blog has lorem ipsum placeholder posts from 2013 — actively hurting SEO.
CherryFramework theme is outdated and likely has security vulnerabilities.
No Google Business Profile connection visible.

assessment.title: Competitive Landscape
points: Chico electrical market includes several well-optimized competitors.
Most electricians in the area have minimal digital presence — opportunity window.
Domain name advantage: chicoelectric.com is the #1 exact-match domain for the market.
Electrical services command high job values ($500-5,000+) — high ROI per lead.
Licensed electrician trust signals are crucial for conversion.

findings.finding: No H1 tag on homepage — critical structural issue
No meta description on any page
Zero schema — no LocalBusiness, no Electrician, no Service
Lorem ipsum placeholder posts from 2013 — hurting SEO
chicoelectric.com — perfect keyword match for local searches
Site serves over HTTPS — properly secured

strategy.title: Phase 1: Critical Cleanup (Months 1-2)
actions: Delete or replace lorem ipsum placeholder blog posts.
Add proper H1 tags to all pages.
Write compelling meta descriptions for all pages.
Add descriptive alt text to all images.
Consider theme migration to modern WordPress theme.

strategy.title: Phase 2: Content & Local SEO (Months 3-5)
actions: Launch real blog content targeting electrical keywords (4 posts/mo).
Create dedicated service pages (panel upgrades, rewiring, EV chargers, lighting, etc.).
Create service area pages for surrounding cities.
Build citation consistency across electrician directories.
Implement FAQ schema for electrical questions.

strategy.title: Phase 3: Growth & Authority (Months 6-12)
actions: Google Ads targeting electrical service keywords.
Video content showcasing expertise and safety practices.
License and certification trust badge implementation.
Monthly competitive analysis and ranking reports.

pricingIntro: Chico Electric has a domain name that competitors would kill for — chicoelectric.com is the exact-match keyword domain for your market. Right now it's being held back by placeholder content, missing schema, and outdated technology. Cleaning up the technical issues and building real content would rapidly improve your search visibility.

pricingTiers.name: STARTER
features: H1 tag and heading structure fix

pricingTiers.name: PREMIUM
features: Theme migration to modern WP theme

about: Ridge Cell Repair LLC is a California-based digital marketing and business analysis firm specializing in helping service-industry businesses grow their online presence and generate more leads. We focus on practical, results-driven strategies rather than flashy marketing that doesn't convert.
Our approach is data-first: we research your market, identify what your competitors are doing (and not doing), and build a strategy that delivers real business outcomes.
What sets us apart is that we treat every client like a partner, not an account number. You get direct access to the people doing the work — no layers of account managers.
nextSteps: Chico Electric has the best domain name in the market — let's build a website that deserves it. Removing the placeholder content, adding schema, and starting a real content strategy would dramatically improve your visibility within 60 days.
